name: Agent Team — Weekly Digest
description: Monday 9:00 AM Europe/Prague. Summary of past week's agent activity: PRs merged by role, patterns added, cost (manual update reference).

parameters.condition: ({{1.head.ref}} starts with 'agent/' OR {{1.head.ref}} starts with 'agent-team/') AND {{1.merged_at}} > now - 604800000 AND {{1.merged}} == true

parameters.filter: message starts with 'chore(agents): learning loop — pattern'

parameters.body:
Past week (Mon-Sun):

• Merged: {{2.length}} agent PRs
• By role: {{3.summary}}
• New patterns added: {{5.count}}

Review backlog: https://github.com/Spookybro55/autosmartweby/pulls
Queue: https://github.com/Spookybro55/autosmartweby/blob/main/docs/agents/QUEUE.md

Manual cost check: https://console.anthropic.com/settings/usage

_setup_notes: MANUAL: cost from Anthropic Console (no API for billing aggregation in MVP).
OPTIONAL EXTENSION: include task records analytics (count of done vs blocked from QUEUE.md / RUN-LOG.md).
